title: Phase 6: Consolidate root into treesitter.go
description: Remove all root package .go files except a single treesitter.go. Collapse all remaining type aliases, constructors, and constants into this one file. Move ReusableNode into internal/parser (only consumer). Delete parser/ public facade (merged into root as an alias). The result: root package is a single file with zero logic. See docs/package-restructure-design.md Phase 6.
